/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MyProgram.dir/examplemain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyProgram.dir/ui_mainmenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyProgram.dir/data_repository.cpp.o -o MyProgram  _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics-s-d.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window-s-d.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system-s-d.a _deps/imgui-sfml-build/libImGui-SFML.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics-s-d.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window-s-d.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system-s-d.a -ObjC -framework OpenGL -framework Foundation -framework AppKit -framework IOKit -framework Carbon _deps/sfml-build/lib/libfreetyped.a -framework OpenGL
